title: Back-Rank Mate
summary: Exploit the king trapped behind his pawns

steps.title: The Classic Pattern
steps.text: A castled king is usually safe — unless his escape squares are blocked by his own pawns. A rook or queen on the 8th rank becomes unstoppable.

steps.hint: The pawn wall is also a prison wall.

steps.title: Trade & Mate
steps.text: When both sides have a back-rank weakness, the one who strikes first wins. Trade the defender to clear the way.

steps.hint: After the trade, Black has no defender left.
